title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence and the need for community safety measures in public spaces.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and technical expertise in polymer extrusion within the local manufacturing sector.

title: Vape Shop Employee Arrested for Rape in North Charlotte
summary: A woman was raped by an employee at the Arbor Smoke Shop in north Charlotte, according to court records.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about safety and security within local businesses.

title: NTSB Investigates Deadly Tanker Explosion in Mooresville
summary: A truck driver was killed and another person injured in a tanker explosion in Mooresville, according to a preliminary NTSB report.
charlotte_impact: Underlines the risks associated with transporting hazardous materials and the importance of safety protocols.

title: Truist Championship Generates $125M Economic Impact
summary: The Truist Championship at Quail Hollow has generated $125 million in economic impact for North Carolina, according to Gov. Stein.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the significant economic benefits of hosting major sporting events in the state.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled in Iryna Zarutska Murder Case
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska, is scheduled for a competency hearing.
charlotte_impact: Follows a high-profile murder case and raises questions about the defendant's mental state.

title: Charlotte Area Implements Mandatory Water Restrictions
summary: Due to exceptional drought conditions, communities across the Charlotte area are implementing mandatory water restrictions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of the drought and the need for water conservation efforts.

title: Union County School Board Approves $174 Million Budget
summary: The Union County school board approved a $174 million budget, prioritizing staff pay with projected 5% raises.
charlotte_impact: Addresses teacher compensation and resource allocation within the local education system.

title: Water Leak Near School Unfixed for a Year Amid Drought
summary: A WCNC Charlotte investigation found a Charlotte Water leak near a school went unfixed for almost a year.
charlotte_impact: Exposes infrastructure issues and water wastage during a critical drought period.

title: Charlotte Homelessness Rises 12% Amid Shrinking Resources
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg's homelessness count reveals a 12% rise to over 2,000 people without shelter.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the growing homelessness crisis and the strain on local resources.

title: Cooler and Drier Weather Forecast for Friday
summary: The weather forecast predicts cooler and drier conditions for Friday, with scattered showers possible this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update relevant to daily activities.

title: Suspect Arrested in Richmond County Shooting
summary: A suspect has been arrested in connection with a shooting in Richmond County where the victim was shot in the chest and leg.

title: Burn Ban Lifted in Mecklenburg County Amid Drought Recovery
summary: The NC Forest Service lifted the burn ban for Mecklenburg and 18 other counties due to recent rainfall.

title: Conviction Upheld in Madalina Cojocari Case
summary: Appeals court upholds conviction of Madalina Cojocari's stepfather, Christopher Palmiter.

title: Crash Closes Portion of US-74 Near Shelby
